title: Plugin Management
subtitle: Review plugin status, trigger reload or rescan, and maintain plugin-level configuration.

schema.empty: This plugin does not provide a configurable schema.

dialog.title: Configure Plugin: {name}
dialog.hint: This form is generated dynamically from backend metadata.

install.title: Install Plugin
install.githubPluginPathHint: For monorepos, for example plugins/shinbot_plugin_example. Leave blank for single-plugin repositories.
install.sourcesLoadFailed: Failed to load plugin install sources
install.missingRequiredBlock: Missing required dependencies block installation. Install the required plugins first, then preview again.
install.overwriteManagedWarning: The target plugin already exists and is managed by WebUI. Enable overwrite before installing.
install.overwriteUnmanagedWarning: The target plugin already exists but is not managed by WebUI, so it cannot be overwritten here.
install.confirmUpdateMessage: Update {name} from its recorded GitHub source and enable it after update?
install.confirmUninstallMessage: Uninstall the WebUI-managed plugin {name}. Plugin data will be kept. Continue?

marketplace.title: Plugin Marketplace
marketplace.localExists: A local plugin with the same id already exists and is not WebUI-managed.
marketplace.differentSource: This plugin was installed from a different source. Manage it from installed plugins.
marketplace.confirmUpdateMessage: Update {name} from the official plugin marketplace and enable it after update?
